release_notes: V14.44 build 214 beta changes the default local mDNS address to leah.local. New units use the alias label leah automatically, so the customer can continue initial setup without defining a custom alias. Known previous default aliases, including leah-2r-displays and leah-2r-setup, are migrated to leah, while custom caregiver-defined aliases remain unchanged and can still be edited from the Web UI. Build 213 setup-password display, Build 212 native OTA commit/reboot guard, Build 211 WhatsApp branding, Build 210 vision/mission and all alarm, Nightscout, SAGE, IOB/COB and display functions are preserved.
